research.status_summary: Actively hiring across 160–302 open roles in Israel (TLV + Haifa), spanning AWS ML, Agentic AI, Applied Science, Annapurna Labs chip design, Prime Video, and data center operations — no signs of pause or layoffs.
research.hiring_policy: Roles are Israel-local (on-site/hybrid, Sunday–Thursday workweek); no EOR or remote-first posture observed — candidates are expected to be Israel-based, and Amazon Israel does not broadly advertise visa sponsorship for external hires into the TLV office.
recent_news: Apr 13 2026: AWS expanded IoT Core and IoT Device Management to the Israel (Tel Aviv) il-central-1 region, signaling continued service rollout into the local cloud infrastructure.

AWS Summit Tel Aviv 2026 (scheduled Sep 10, 2026) features a 'Gen AI Village' with 100+ sessions on agentic AI, Amazon Bedrock, and generative AI — the biggest AWS community event in Israel this year.

AWS denied a Globes (Israeli press) report that it was halting data center expansion in Israel, with a spokesperson confirming it continues to invest 'in line with our previously announced investment plan' of $7.2B through 2037.

Shareholder proposal at Amazon's May 2026 annual meeting called on the board to audit whether AWS's AI/cloud contracts with Israel's military (Project Nimbus) align with its responsible AI policies — adding reputational scrutiny to the Israel operation.
research.growth_signal: AWS Israel (il-central-1) is in steady infrastructure expansion mode — new compute instances (EC2 M7i, Feb 2026), new IoT services (Apr 2026), and a dedicated Machine Learning Israel (MLIL) team with active Agentic AI SDE headcount — pointing to a growing AI/ML engineering hub in TLV.
research.fit_for_lior: Strong fit on the AWS Agentic AI and MLIL teams (open SDE roles in Agentic AI, Applied Scientist intern, RecsAI personalization SDE) and Amazon Stores Shopping Personalization AI — all squarely in Lior's Creative AI + Product Analyst sweet spot, with the Bedrock/GenAI ecosystem providing direct vibe-coding relevance.
